title: STATE BOARD OF NURSING - 211info
text: OREGON STATE BOARD OF NURSING STATE BOARD OF NURSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Determines licensure and certification requirements, interprets the Oregon Nurse Practice Act, maintains lists of approved Oregon nursing educational programs, evaluates and approves nursing and nursing assistant programs, issues licenses and renewals, investigates complaints and takes disciplinary action against licensees who violate the Oregon Nurse Practice Act, maintains the nursing assistant registry, and provides testimony to the legislature and other organizations as needed. 17938 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Portland, OR 97224 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (971) 673-0685 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 673-0685 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Complaints can be made US mail or using online complaint form. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Occupational/Professional Licensing and Certification * Nurses/Nursing Support Personnel Practitioner Complaints If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE BOARD OF NURSING
